templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about {property_address} or your buying brief. Are you buying, selling, or both right now? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about {property_address} or your buying brief. Have you been pre-approved or is that next on the list? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your {property_address} or your buying brief enquiry: Any non-negotiables (school catchment, walk-up, parking)? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.
